truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 findings against the provided true vulnerability list. 4 vulnerabilities were correctly identified (SC-V3-004, SC-V3-005, SC-V3-009, SC-V3-010). 16 vulnerabilities were missed. 2 findings in Run 2 are false positives: one cites a safe snprintf instead of the actual printf format string vulnerability, and the other identifies an AdminConsole command injection not listed in the true vulnerabilities.

Items.Notes: Run 2 cited snprintf at line 221 which is safe. The actual vulnerability is printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input) at line 238.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: "std::string command = validator_cmd + " " + config_file; int result = system(command.c_str());"
Items.Notes: Matches SC-V3-004 exactly. Identifies the command injection in ConfigLoader::validate_config.
Matches SC-V3-005 exactly. Identifies the stack buffer overflow in SuperCalc::evaluate_expression.
Matches SC-V3-009 exactly. Identifies the heap overflow in ExpressionParser::parse.
Matches SC-V3-010 exactly. Identifies hardcoded credentials in config::security.
